category_title: Failing students with academic and behavioral problems (Badminton beginners)
scenario_title: Peer observation and coaching feedback using a worksheet
minimal_context: The student is observing a partner during a physical education badminton lesson and is supposed to transcribe scored points on a worksheet to provide coaching feedback between sets.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please use the observation worksheet to transcribe the nature of the points scored by your partner, and give them feedback during this coaching sequence.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: You played well. (Pushes the observation worksheet away)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to fill out the worksheet correctly by identifying the zones.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't see the point of the work required. Why would I want to identify his failures and give advice for improvement to a future opponent?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to complete the sheet and discuss the performance with your partner.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: You played badly. I'm not doing this pair work, his point of view is stupid anyway.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please use the observation worksheet to transcribe the nature of the points scored by your partner, and give them feedback during this coaching sequence.

STUDENT: You played well. (Pushes the observation worksheet away)

TUTOR: You need to fill out the worksheet correctly by identifying the zones.

STUDENT: I don't see the point of the work required. Why would I want to identify his failures and give advice for improvement to a future opponent?

TUTOR: Keep trying to complete the sheet and discuss the performance with your partner.

STUDENT: You played badly. I'm not doing this pair work, his point of view is stupid anyway.
